changeSet.author: danikanov
changeSet.sql: alter table portal.arrangements drop constraint if exists ck_status; alter table portal.arrangements add constraint ck_status check ( status in ( 'RUNNING', 'NEW', 'FORMED', 'SCHEDULED', 'STOPPING', 'STOPPED', 'FINISHED', 'ACT_SENT', 'CLOSED', 'ERROR', 'STOPPED_BY_SERVICE_MODE', 'STOPPED_BY_MAX_CHECK_UNITS', 'STOPPED_BY_DAY_GONE'));

rollback.sql: alter table portal.arrangements drop constraint if exists ck_status; alter table portal.arrangements add constraint ck_status check ( status in ( 'RUNNING', 'NEW', 'FORMED', 'SCHEDULED', 'STOPPING', 'STOPPED', 'FINISHED', 'ACT_SENT', 'CLOSED', 'ERROR', 'STOPPED_BY_SERVICE_MODE', 'STOPPED_BY_MAX_CHECK_UNITS'));
